calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trustee To Provide Trust Document And Will
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jessica Perl for Petitioner.

Ms. Perl stated that the Trustee has been served and that they have heard nothing from the Respondent as to what is going on. The Court stated that it has no problem with ordering that the will be lodged pursuant to Probate Code 8201, but that the Trust is different, that Ms. Perl's Client is only entitled to it if the Client is a named Beneficiary, and that it does not know if it has the authority to bifurcate the issue of the Trust. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Provide Trust Document and Will is granted as to the will and denied as to the Trust. Ms. Perl is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
